name: Healthcare Allowance
notes: Financial contribution towards health insurance costs for eligible citizens.

name: Taxpayer
notes: Person who may be liable to pay taxes under Dutch law.

name: Income
notes: Monetary compensation received from work, benefits, or other sources.

name: Tax Return
notes: Formal declaration of income and deductible expenses submitted to tax authorities.

name: Benefits Partner
notes: Person whose circumstances affect the calculation of benefits and allowances.
